rules.name: Profile must have access to conversation phone number
rules.description: A user may only send/receive messages for conversations whose phone number is accessible by at least one of the user's profiles (profile intersection check).
rules.green_ai_mapping: Replicate in Handler: verify ProfileId ∈ ConversationPhoneNumbers.ProfileMappings via SQL

rules.name: Tenant isolation — via ConversationPhoneNumbers.CustomerId (indirect)
rules.description: ConversationMessages have no direct CustomerId. Tenant isolation flows through: ConversationMessage.ConversationId → Conversations.ConversationPhoneNumberId → ConversationPhoneNumbers.CustomerId.
rules.green_ai_mapping: All message queries MUST join through Conversations → ConversationPhoneNumbers WHERE CustomerId=@CustomerId. No direct CustomerId on ConversationMessages.
rules.note: Same INDIRECT pattern as conversation_creation — verified consistent

rules.name: SMS dispatch precedes DB insert
rules.description: Layer 0 sends the SMS to the external gateway BEFORE inserting the ConversationMessage record. If DB insert fails after send, message is lost in DB but delivered to SMS.
rules.green_ai_mapping: green-ai design: INSERT first (Status=Pending), then dispatch SMS via outbox/job. Update Status=Delivered/Failed via DLR callback. Decouples atomicity risk.
rules.risk: HIGH — if SMS send succeeds but DB insert fails, message is untracked

rules.name: Direction inferred from SmsLogId null-check
rules.description: No explicit Direction column. SmsLogId NULL = inbound from partner. SmsLogId NOT NULL = outbound sent by customer.
rules.green_ai_mapping: Maintain same convention in green-ai. IsReply bool on response DTO derived from SmsLogId != null.

rules.name: Delivery status lifecycle
rules.description: ConversationMessage.Status (ConversationMessageStatus enum) follows: Pending(0) → Delivered(1) | Failed(2). Updated by SmsLogId match on DLR callback.
rules.green_ai_mapping: Status column and enum identical. DLR update: UPDATE ConversationMessages SET Status=@status WHERE SmsLogId=@smsLogId

rules.name: Unread state on conversation (not on message)
rules.description: There is no per-message unread flag. Unread state is tracked on Conversations.Unread (BIT). When inbound message arrives → Unread=true. When user views conversation → Unread=false (MarkConversationRead).
rules.green_ai_mapping: MarkConversationRead / MarkConversationUnread map directly. ConversationUnreadStatusChangedEvent → SSE push.

rules.name: SSE notification on every sent/received message
rules.description: Every message insertion (outbound and inbound) triggers a ClientEvent of type CONVERSATIONMESSAGESENT, pushed to SSE group 'ConversationMessageSent/{conversationPhoneNumberId}'.
rules.green_ai_mapping: Replicate SSE ClientEvent push after insert. GroupName pattern identical.

rules.name: Idempotency guard on outbound message insert
rules.description: Before inserting a ConversationMessage, Layer 0 checks GetConversationMessageBySmsLogId(smsLogId). If already exists, returns early without duplicate insert.
rules.green_ai_mapping: transformation_required — if SMS-first order is changed (RULE_CM_003), idempotency guard needs redesign. If insert-first, SmsLogId is assigned after send, so guard moves to DLR update path.
rules.note: Race condition possible in Layer 0: two concurrent sends with same SmsLogId — unlikely but unguarded
